titles.title: Bless The Lord, Oh My Soul

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bless the Lord, Oh, my soul, And all that is within me Bless His holy name. Bless the Lord, Oh, my soul And all that is within me Bless His holy name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For He has done great things, He has done great things, He has done great things, Bless His holy name.
